description: A vertical graphic built on a photograph of a wooden judge's gavel resting on its block in front of a softly blurred American flag, with a hint of brass scales of justice behind. White text at the upper left reads Citizenship is a privilege for those who obey our laws, beside the Department of Homeland Security seal and the U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services wordmark.
notable_text: Citizenship is a privilege for those who obey our laws; U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services
